title_en: Organic vs Non-Organic Fruit: The Dirty Truth
title_es: Fruta Orgánica vs No Orgánica: La Sucia Verdad
hook_es: ¡Mira el truco de magia de esta manzana! 🍎
key_message: Organic fruit is free from synthetic pesticides, unlike conventional fruit, which can carry multiple residues.
_source_food_context:
DAILY STAPLE COMPARISON [Produce]:
• HEALTHY: Organic fruits (especially the Dirty Dozen: strawberries, apples, grapes, peaches, etc.)
• PROCESSED/CONVENTIONAL: Conventionally grown fruits sprayed with synthetic pesticides, fungicides, and wax coatings
• KEY FACT: The EWG Dirty Dozen shows that conventional strawberries can contain residues of 20+ different pesticides. Organic farming prohibits synthetic pesticides and has been linked to higher antioxidant levels
• VISUAL IDEA: Wash a conventional apple — show how water beads off the wax coating. 'That shiny coating isn't natural'

title_es: El Secreto de los Duraznos Brillantes 🍑
hook_en: Why is this peach so shiny? 🤔
key_message: Conventional peaches are often coated with wax and pesticides; organic ones aren't.
_source_food_context:
